mapper.select: SELECT book_id, title, author, publisher, TO_CHAR(publish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS publish_date, price FROM book ORDER BY book_id desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book(title, author, publisher, publish_date, price) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, TO_DATE(#{publishDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{price})
